mapper.sql: id, user_id, sales_user_id, building_id, room_id, appointment_time, contact_name, contact_phone, remark, status, cancel_reason, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment ( user_id, sales_user_id, building_id, room_id, appointment_time, contact_name, contact_phone, remark, status, create_user, update_user ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{salesUserId}, #{buildingId}, #{roomId}, #{appointmentTime}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update: UPDATE appointment SET status = 4, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM appointment WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
